params.description: Data table appears showing student's collected data from the counting game. Four categories: Red blocks, Blue blocks, Green blocks, Yellow blocks. Values are multiples of 5 between 10 and 45.

Vertical bar graph appears ready to display student data. Scale Preview System visible with four clickable scale buttons: Scale of 1, Scale of 2, Scale of 5, Scale of 10. Graph updates when a scale button is clicked.

beats.text: You know how to use different scales. But which one should you use for YOUR data?
Let's find out. Click each scale to see what the graph would look like.

elements.description: Data table showing student's collected block data. Four categories with values that are multiples of 5 between 10 and 45.
Vertical bar graph with Scale Preview System. Four scale buttons visible: Scale of 1, Scale of 2, Scale of 5, Scale of 10. Graph ready to display data when scale is selected.

params.description: Student clicks through all four scale options. Scale of 1 shows many tick marks. Scale of 2 displays data clearly. Scale of 5 fits all values. Scale of 10 also fits all values. All four scales successfully display the data.

beats.text: All four scales work for this data! You have choices.

elements.description: Data table showing student's collected block data.
Vertical bar graph displaying student data. Scale Preview System showing all four scale options explored. All scales confirmed as working for this dataset.
